summary_en: ¥200M authorization, up to 330,000 shares (5.5% of shares outstanding), open-market acquisition on TSE, May 18, 2026 through May 14, 2027. Stated rationale: enhance shareholder returns and capital efficiency.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Own Shares
translation_en_brief: Edia Co., Ltd. announced on May 15, 2026 that its board of directors has resolved to acquire up to 330,000 of its own common shares, representing 5.5% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury shares). The acquisition is authorized up to a total of ¥200 million. Shares will be purchased on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under open-market methods between May 18, 2026 and May 14, 2027. The company stated the acquisition is intended to enhance shareholder returns, improve capital efficiency, and enable flexible capital allocation in response to changing business conditions.
